title: DTU RAVEN Completes First Test Flight
excerpt: DTU RAVEN successfully completed its first test flight, marking a significant milestone.
content: DTU RAVEN is airborne! Today, we completed our first test flight! While early challenges cost us a propeller, we quickly identified and fixed the issue—proving that setbacks are just stepping stones on the path to progress. Seeing our drone take off was a huge milestone for the team, and this is just the beginning. With each test flight, we refine our systems, strengthen our problem-solving skills, and get one step closer to pushing the boundaries of autonomous technology.
